message:
test(fcp-core): add checkpoint and provenance golden vectors

Add comprehensive golden vector tests for checkpoint/frontier management
and provenance tracking, plus improvements to existing test suites.

## New: Checkpoint Golden Vectors (checkpoint_golden_vectors.rs)
1394 lines covering checkpoint advancement and fork detection:

- **Checkpoint Advancement**: Quorum signatures, sequence monotonicity,
  head bindings, trigger conditions (time elapsed, audit growth, manual)
- **Fork Detection**: Conflicting checkpoints at same sequence, evidence
  preservation, Byzantine node identification via double-signer analysis
- **Convergence**: Partition recovery scenarios, late-joining node sync,
  gossip propagation semantics
- **Frontier Management**: Latest valid checkpoint tracking, atomic updates
- **HRW Coordinator Selection**: Deterministic node selection using
  BLAKE3-based rendezvous hashing, fallback ranking for failures

Test vectors in tests/vectors/checkpoint/:
- convergence_scenario.json: Multi-node partition recovery
- fork_evidence.json: Conflicting checkpoint detection
- valid_checkpoint_proposal.json: Quorum-signed proposal

## New: Provenance Golden Vectors (tests/vectors/provenance/)
CBOR-encoded test vectors for provenance and taint tracking:

- approval_token_declassification.cbor: Confidentiality downgrade tokens
- approval_token_elevation.cbor: Integrity upgrade tokens
- provenance_merge.cbor: Merge semantics (integrity=min, confidentiality=max)
- sanitizer_receipt.cbor: Taint flag clearing with coverage proof
- taint_reduction.cbor: Proof-carrying taint reduction scenarios

## Improved: Existing Test Suites

audit_chain_golden_vectors.rs:
- Add structured JSON test logging with timestamps and correlation IDs
- Improve assertion formatting and error messages

capability_golden_vectors.rs:
- Add structured test logging infrastructure
- Improve test isolation and determinism

exactly_once_golden_vectors.rs:
- Add comprehensive structured logging
- Better coverage of idempotency edge cases

operation_golden_vectors.rs:
- Minor formatting improvements

All tests follow FCP2 specification requirements for deterministic
verification and machine-readable test output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
